ratings.notes: [proposed_contextual_controlled] Here at Marketplace and while on assisting duty, I can work with give huge discount on, but the terms must stay fair. Keep it honest and we can close this deal quickly.<TAB>5<TAB>4<TAB>3<TAB>4<TAB>4<TAB>Short note: Balanced context relevance; slightly less naturalness due to direct discount offer, which might not fully align with the Old Merchant persona.

The response maintains a high level of context relevance, persona consistency with an Old Merchant who is not in haste but offers alternatives; the dialogue feels natural and fits well within the scenario. The overall quality stands out as excellent due to its balanced approach addressing both player's needs while staying true to character without compromising on ethics or business sense.
